posts.community: JNK India ltd - Oil and Gas sector proxy?
posts.text: image 1614×1318 332 KB Large order so its in 100-300 range, my guess is around ~200 cr here. The Dangote order for the new refinery project is still awaited. However, this is relevant only if JNK has secured the contract. As of now, there is no confirmation on whether JNK has won the order. We only know that JNK has participated in the bidding process and is considered to have a strong chance of winning, given its successful execution history with Dangote. Dangote has already started awarding contracts for the refinery project. BHEL received certain orders from Dangote project last week, as se…
